style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. On the left, a board with a few small moves marked by rust warning marks labelled SPEED RUN, SELF-APPROVAL, BURST TURNS. An arrow leads to a single enforcement token labelled THE REAPER, drawn as a simple iconographic hooded scythe motif in navy line work, not a realistic person. From it, a heavy rust arrow points to a small score bar dropping sharply, labelled POINTS REMOVED, THEN REMOVED AGAIN. A caption reads CHEATING COSTS MORE THAN IT PAYS. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no realistic people.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. On the left, a board with a few small moves marked by rust warning marks labelled SPEED RUN, SELF-APPROVAL, BURST TURNS. An arrow leads to a single enforcement token labelled THE REAPER, drawn as a simple iconographic hooded scythe motif in navy line work, not a realistic person. From it, a heavy rust arrow points to a small score bar dropping sharply, labelled POINTS REMOVED, THEN REMOVED AGAIN. A caption reads CHEATING COSTS MORE THAN IT PAYS. The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
